steps.title: Find the target: 1/3 of total females
steps.content: From the table, the total number of female penguins is 180. One-third of this population is: $$\frac{1}{3} \times 180 = 60$$

steps.title: Compare each type's female count to the target
steps.content:
Check which penguin type's female population is closest to 60:
  • Chinstrap: 59 females (difference = 1)
  • Emperor: 27 females (difference = 33)
  • Gentoo: 54 females (difference = 6)
  • Macaroni: 40 females (difference = 20)
Chinstrap's female population of 59 is closest to the target of 60, with the smallest distance of just 1. That matches choice A — A is correct.
